metadata.description: Claude Code plugins published by Ideamans — starting with gridgram (grid-based diagrams) and expanding from there.

plugins.name: gridgram
plugins.description: Adds /gg-render, /gg-icons, and /gg-author skills for authoring grid-based diagrams with gridgram.

plugins.name: chartjs2img
plugins.description: Adds /chartjs2img-render, /chartjs2img-author, and /chartjs2img-install skills for generating Chart.js charts as server-rendered PNG/JPEG images.
